description: P3 Feature Ports - Visual feedback loop (screenshot analysis), style presets, and AI-generated app icons from sibling repos
steps: 1. Add style presets system: create artifacts/api-server/src/lib/style-presets.ts with 5 presets (cyberpunk, minimalist, brutalist, apple-native, elegant-dark). Each preset defines: name, description, color palette hint, typography style, animation style, component style. These get injected into the planning/building prompts.
2. Add a 'stylePreset' optional field to the CreateProjectBody and GenerateAppBody Zod schemas (and update the OpenAPI spec). Default to null (let AI choose).
3. Update the planning phase in the generation service to include the selected style preset in the system prompt when provided.

4. Add AI icon generation endpoint: POST /api/projects/:id/generate-icon. Uses the Gemini provider (with gemini-2.5-flash-image model) to generate an app icon based on the project name and description. Saves the base64 PNG as a project_file with path 'Assets.xcassets/AppIcon.appiconset/icon.png'.

5. Add visual feedback endpoint: POST /api/projects/:id/visual-feedback. Accepts a base64 screenshot in the request body plus an optional instruction. Uses Gemini's vision capability to analyze the screenshot against the project's generated code, identify UI issues, and return a JSON response with: issues found, suggested fixes, and optionally patched file contents.
6. Update lib/api-spec/openapi.yaml with the new endpoints and run codegen to regenerate api-client-react and api-zod.
7. Add basic tests for: style preset injection, icon generation returns 503 when Gemini not configured, visual feedback validates required fields.
acceptance_criteria: 5 style presets are defined and accessible
Projects can optionally specify a style preset at creation or generation time
Style preset modifies the AI planning prompt when provided
POST /api/projects/:id/generate-icon works with Gemini API key (returns 503 without it)
POST /api/projects/:id/visual-feedback accepts screenshot + instruction and returns analysis
OpenAPI spec is updated and codegen passes
findings: All 76 tests pass (including 10 new tests for style presets, icon generation, and visual feedback). Skipped OpenAPI codegen as instructed - Zod schemas defined directly in request-schemas.ts. Style preset column added to projects table schema. Postgres server in this environment requires foreground process in same shell command. Used push-force to sync schema.
